import pathlib

# Correct: use a dispatch registry to map extensions to loader functions
LOADERS = {
    ".csv": load_csv,
    ".json": load_json,
    ".xml": load_xml,
}

def load_data(filepath):
    ext = pathlib.Path(filepath).suffix
    loader = LOADERS.get(ext)
    if not loader:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported format: {ext}")
    return loader(filepath)
